suggestions.desc: Remove unused import declaration.
Remove unused variable "Article".

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

source:
"use client"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import Image from "next/image"; import Link from "next/link"; import { AboutSectionData, LayananMaklonData, TrustedBannerData, FinalCTAData } from "@/types"; export function KenaliDreamlab({ data }: { data: AboutSectionData }) { return (
{/* Floating Badge */}

{data.badge.title}

{data.badge.name}
Architect Behind The Brand

{data.title.split(' ').slice(0, 2).join(' ')} {data.title.split(' ').slice(2).join(' ')}

{data.description}

{data.cta}
); } export function LayananMaklon({ data }: { data: LayananMaklonData }) { return (
#1 One Stop Solution

{data.title}

{data.subtitle}

{data.items.map((item: any, idx: number) => (

{item.title}

{item.description}

))}
); } export function TrustedBanner({ data }: { data: TrustedBannerData }) { return (

{data.text}

{data.logos.map((logo: string, idx: number) => (
))}
); } export function FinalCTA({ data }: { data: FinalCTAData }) { return (
{/* Background Pattern */}

{data.title.split(' Ahlinya!')[0]} Ahlinya!

{data.subtitle}

{data.ctaText}
{/* Floating Element */}

Start Your Brand Now!

); }
